ListItem.Para: Opposite switch is verified to operate normally.
Associated selector switch remains in NORM position.
Display units operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify that all positions of the opposite PFD/MFD selector operate normally (AMM DDG 31-61-06).

ListItem.Para: Confirm that the NORM position operates normally:
Set the opposite PFD/MFD selector to NORM.
Confirm the associated outboard display unit displays the PFD and the inboard display unit displays the MFD/MFD or MFD/EICAS format.
Confirm that the INBD position operates normally:
Set the opposite PFD/MFD selector to INBD.
Confirm the associated inboard display unit displays the PFD/MFD or PFD/EICAS format and the outboard display unit blanks.
Confirm that the OUTBD position operates normally:
Set opposite PFD/MFD selector to OUTBD.
Confirm the associated outboard display unit displays the PFD/MFD or PFD/EICAS format and the inboard display blanks.
Set opposite PFD/MFD selector to NORM.
Opposite switch is verified to operate normally.
Associated selector switch remains in NORM position.
Display units operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify that all positions of the opposite PFD/MFD selector operate normally (AMM DDG 31-61-06).

ListItem.Para: Confirm that the NORM position operates normally:
Set the opposite PFD/MFD selector to NORM.
Confirm the associated outboard display unit displays the PFD and the inboard display unit displays the MFD/MFD or MFD/EICAS format.
Confirm that the INBD position operates normally:
Set the opposite PFD/MFD selector to INBD.
Confirm the associated inboard display unit displays the PFD/MFD or PFD/EICAS format and the outboard display unit blanks.
Confirm that the OUTBD position operates normally:
Set opposite PFD/MFD selector to OUTBD.
Confirm the associated outboard display unit displays the PFD/MFD or PFD/EICAS format and the inboard display blanks.
Set opposite PFD/MFD selector to NORM.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative with associated selector switch in OUTBD position provided left inboard display unit is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 31-61-01-02.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative with associated selector switch in INBD position provided left outboard display unit is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 31-61-01-03.
